text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, on the way back from an outing with
Kitasan Black, we stop by the mall to do some
shopping.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Huh? Is that...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: I knew it! It is! Hi, Inari!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
If it isn't Kitasan! Hey, if ya got some time, swing
by and visit me later!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I'm helpin' out with a food stall at a special
event! Do you guys have anything in particular ya
reeeally like?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Good question! Honestly, I love all food stall
goodies...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Oh, wait! I really like honeycomb toffee!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Whoa-ho, not one for the fancy stuff, are ya?
You sure ya wouldn't prefer a kebab or crepe?
choice_data_list: All you want is honeycomb toffee?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Yeah! I've loved it ever since I was a kid!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Haha, I see! If ya like it that much, then I'll
graciously get ya some, my treat!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, would you really? Thank you! I'll savor
every bite!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Mmm, it tastes so good!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. I used to share my food with my little
brothers in the park like this.
choice_data_list: That sounds like a good memory.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
It is! Whenever we went to a festival, our parents
would always buy us something to eat!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I loved eating honeycomb toffee together with
my dad, mom, and brothers...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Heck, I even threw a tantrum or two about it. I
just didn't understand why they didn't sell it on
non-festival days.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
That's when one of my dad's pupils told me how
easy it is to make toffee. But when I made it...

text_block_list.name: Young Kitasan
text_block_list.text:
How come my toffee's not as fun as the toffee at
festivals?

text_block_list.name: Young Kitasan
text_block_list.text:
I wanna eat the same kinda toffee we get at
festivals!

text_block_list.name: Apprentice
text_block_list.text: Well, Li'l Miss, that's because...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
"A food's flavor changes depending on where you
eat it and who you eat it with." ...That's what he
told me.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
That's when I realized what I really liked was
sharing the candy with my family during festival
days...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Eating with the people I love during the festivals I
love was what made it special!
choice_data_list:
The taste of it must bring back a lot of
memories for you.
You must really love your family.
You must really love your family.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Eating with the people I love during the festivals I
love was what made it special!
choice_data_list:
The taste of it must bring back a lot of
memories for you.
You must really love your family.
You must really love your family.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
It does! And all those special memories are very
precious to me. But you know...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I don't think I'll ever forget the taste of the
honeycomb toffee I had today either.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Hanging out with you and telling you about my
childhood, well... Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
The sweetness I tasted long ago filled me with
excitement, but the sweetness I tasted today has
filled my chest with warmth!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, we should have honeycomb toffee again
sometime! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And that's how we ended up with a new taste that
will surely remind us both of happy memories for
a long time to come.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: I sure do!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
My family is front and center in every one of my
fond memories!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
It's too hard to go to a festival together as a
family nowadays, but I sure wanna eat
honeycomb toffee with them again...
choice_data_list: How about you make some, then?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I could, but I think my family would agree that it's
just not the same as eating together at a
festival...
choice_data_list: But isn't the most important thing where you eat something and who you eat it with?
But isn't the most important thing where you eat something and who you eat it with?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Oh!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
You're right! Having honeycomb toffee together
with my family after so long might create a new
and special taste to remember!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I'll need to practice a lot so I can make the
ultimate toffee!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Really? Then let's start by making around thirty
portions!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Well, if you count my dad's apprentices, my
family is well over twenty people! Now let's do
this!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After we get back to the academy, Kitasan Black
and I churn out a huge amount of honeycomb
toffee together.
